goal: Decide whether GitHub Copilot agent session streaming implies a necessary AOF post-v6.9 direction.
risk: AOF may keep claiming runtime-backed work while humans still cannot reconstruct live prompts, responses, tool calls, artifact writes, decisions, verification, and stop events.
loss_boundary: Do not open v7 implementation work until the direction is bounded to local vendor-neutral session observability rather than Copilot-specific integration.
acceptance_gates: Direction document exists and states adoption boundary.
Council review approves or rejects the direction.
External signal is represented through local evidence rather than unresolved evidence refs.
evidence_plan: Use docs/v7.0-agent-session-observability-direction.md, TASK-084, Council review, v6.9 release definition, and governance audits as local evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop after direction selection; defer implementation until a bounded v7 work item is opened.
